principle: External repositories and research materials are references only. Runtime capability must be implemented as owned builtin modules.

rules.title: External assets are reference only
rules.description: External repositories, starred repositories, papers, docs and experiments must not become runtime dependencies by default.

rules.title: Fuse before creating new skills
rules.description: New assets should first be matched into existing builtin modules. Create a new module only when no existing module fits.

rules.title: No one-repo-one-skill default
rules.description: Multiple similar repositories should strengthen one owned module instead of producing duplicate skills.

rules.title: Manual review before enablement
rules.description: New module candidates require human review before becoming runtime capabilities.

rules.title: Owned runtime only
rules.description: Planner and executor should use owned builtin modules and approved tools, not external repo code directly.

create_new_module_when: no existing builtin module has strong semantic/tag match
asset introduces materially new runtime capability
implementation can be owned and audited
do_not_create_when: asset is only a list/awesome collection
asset duplicates an existing builtin module
asset would require external runtime dependency
